vibe: Minimal, elegant, feminine but professional. Trust-building, calm, nurturing.

components.hero: Asymmetrical layout. Large H1 text on the left, high-end serif. Right side: Elegant overlapping images or single large profile image of Sandhya with a very subtle drop shadow and soft rounded corners (e.g., rounded-2xl). Background should be a very soft gradient blending #FDFBF7 and #F4EFE6.
components.buttons: Rounded-full (pill shape) for primary CTAs to feel feminine and smooth. Background #C5A059, text #FFFFFF, transition to #B38F4E on hover. Add a subtle shadow. Provide a 'data-testid' for testing.
components.cards: For pricing and benefits: Background #FFFFFF, 1px border of subtle border color or rgba(0,0,0,0.05), rounded-2xl, generous padding (p-10). Pricing should highlight the 'Standard' plan with a slightly elevated shadow and a subtle '#C5A059' border. No generic drop shadows, just soft ambient shadow.
components.video_section: Instead of raw embed, show a beautifully styled placeholder image with an elegant, glassy play button in the center. Use 'backdrop-blur-md bg-white/30 border border-white/40' for the play button to give it that luxury crystal feel.
components.header: Sticky nav with crystal glass effect: backdrop-blur-xl bg-[#FDFBF7]/80, 1px bottom border of rgba(45,42,38,0.05).
components.footer: Generous padding, background #F4EFE6, clean minimalist typography.

motion.page_load: Fade-in and slight slide-up (y: 20 -> 0, opacity: 0 -> 1) over 0.8s.
motion.hover_states: Buttons lift slightly (-translate-y-0.5) with scale-up (scale-105) on hover.

hero_profile.description: Smiling confident Indian woman, ideal for Sandhya's profile in Hero and About sections.

video_thumbnail.description: Abstract beige canvas texture to serve as the background for the video placeholder.

instructions_to_main_agent: Strictly adhere to the selected fonts: Playfair Display for headings and Outfit for body. Import them via Google Fonts.
All navigation links and CTAs must have a 'data-testid' attribute.
Do not use generic blue/indigo default Tailwind colors. Use the custom color palette provided.
Use framer-motion for staggering entrance of Pricing cards, Testimonial cards, and Benefits.
The Hero image should not be fully covered by an overlay; it's a paid asset. Let it shine or place it next to the text. Use grid or flex to keep it clean.
For the Schedule section, display a simple, elegant list or table showing Mon, Wed, Sat at 7 PM IST.
For Pricing Section, emphasize the Standard tier visually (maybe slightly larger size, subtle golden border). All pricing must be in ₹ (INR).
Use lucide-react for icons (e.g. checks in pricing, stars in testimonials).
Use raw HTML/Tailwind for structural creative layouts, do not rely on Shadcn Card for everything to avoid a rigid generic look. Let it be flowy and feminine.
